---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something that would make Codetta better
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
<What are you trying to do that's currently hard or impossible?>

**The proposed solution**
<What would the ideal behavior look like?>

**Alternatives considered**
<Other ways to solve the problem, even ones you don't like, so we can
discuss tradeoffs.>

**Scope check**
<Codetta deliberately stays small — see [CONTRIBUTING.md scope statement](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#scope-statement-what-we-say-no-to).
Does this fit? If unsure, that's fine — we'll discuss in comments.>
